{"cards": [{"name": "Skywatch Chronicler", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}{U}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W", "U"], "color_identity": ["W", "U"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Wizard", "oracle_text": "Flying
Whenever ~ attacks, scry 1.
When ~ enters, if you control another creature, draw a card.", "flavor_text": ""Every flight reveals new truths to record."", "power": "2", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Azorius signpost that rewards having creatures (white) while providing card selection and draw (blue). Flying and scry on attack encourage aggressive play, while the ETB draw rewards going wide. Balanced at 2/2 for 3 mana with upside."}, {"name": "Bloodpact Marauder", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["B", "R"], "color_identity": ["B", "R"], "type_line": "Creature — Vampire Warrior", "oracle_text": "Menace
Whenever ~ deals combat damage to a player, that player discards a card and ~ deals 2 damage to target creature or planeswalker.
At the beginning of your end step, if an opponent discarded a card this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on ~.", "flavor_text": "Pain shared is power gained.", "power": "3", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Rakdos build-around that combines discard (black) and damage (red). Creates a feedback loop where combat damage enables discard, which grows the creature. Menace ensures damage gets through. Build-around potential with other discard effects."}, {"name": "Wayfarer's Compass", "mana_cost": "{2}", "cmc": 2, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact — Equipment", "oracle_text": "Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle."
Equip {2}", "flavor_text": "It points not north, but toward new horizons.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple equipment that provides modest stats and mana fixing/ramp. The land search requires dealing combat damage, encouraging aggressive play. Costed appropriately for common rarity with reasonable equip cost."}, {"name": "Resonance Engine", "mana_cost": "{4}", "cmc": 4, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {C}{C}.
{3}, {T}: Copy target instant or sorcery spell you control. You may choose new targets for the copy.
{6}, {T}, Sacrifice ~: Draw three cards.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Complex artifact with three distinct modes: mana production, spell copying, and card draw. Each ability has escalating costs and power levels. The sacrifice ability provides an end-game mana sink and avoids overpowered permanents."}, {"name": "Seraph of Divine Justice", "mana_cost": "{3}{W}{B}", "cmc": 5, "colors": ["W", "B"], "color_identity": ["W", "B"], "type_line": "Legendary Planeswalker — Seraph", "oracle_text": "+1: You gain 2 life and each opponent loses 1 life.
-2: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its power.
-7: You get an emblem with "Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, you may exile target permanent that player controls."", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": "4", "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Orzhov planeswalker with lifegain/drain (+1), conditional removal (-2), and a powerful emblem ultimate (-7). The +1 is repeatable value, the -2 is expensive but fair removal with compensation, and the ultimate creates lasting advantage. Starting loyalty of 4 allows immediate -2 or two +1s."}]}
